{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of a Thousand Eyes
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|see anywhere the Sage of a Thousand Eyes can}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, forge globes of light into eyes, grant vision}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Oracle Sage]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage]] of a [[Thousand Eyes]], also referred to as the [[Oracle Sage]], is a woman with an honorable reputation associated with the Arelius homeland. She is characterized by blonde hair streaked with gray and a pleasant, wrinkled face, typically wearing worn dark blue robes. Her primary ability involves the manifestation of numerous eyes made of light madra that swarm around her like bees or a sunrise. These celestial lenses allow her to see anywhere her presence can reach, providing her with immense sensory perception and the ability to transmit messages through the [[Way]]. While she is a formidable presence capable of exerting significant intangible pressure and utilizing her authority with great skill, she is considered an annoying opponent due to a weakness in direct, straightforward combat; some Archlords are capable of matching her strength one-on-one. There has been speculation regarding whether she is still alive, as she had not been active since the passing of her [[Monarch]].}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] has an honorable reputation.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] is also known as the [[Oracle Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] has the ability to see anywhere the [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] can.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] had commented on [[Eithan]] reaching [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage]] of a [[Thousand Eyes]] serves as a guide for [[Mercy]], utilizing floating eyes to illustrate her various commands. While she possesses the ability to grant vision and can forge globes of light into eyes to amplify her authority, she is not a formidable opponent in straightforward combat. Her power relies heavily on these ocular manifestations to direct others.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] guides [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] uses floating eyes to provide illustrations for commands.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] has a weakness in straightforward combat.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] can forge globes of light into eyes to amplify her authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]] can grant vision.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
